name: PMAY-G
target_description: Rural houseless households or those living in zero/one/two-room houses with kutcha walls and kutcha roof as per SECC 2011

rules.description: Applicant must reside in a rural area
Family must be in SECC 2011 BPL list or hold AAY/PHH ration card
rules.ambiguity_note: SECC 2011 data is stale — beneficiary list may not reflect current poverty status accurately

rules.description: Must have land to build on OR be allotted land by gram panchayat
rules.ambiguity_note: Landless households may be allotted land by gram panchayat — 'none' is ambiguous and requires local verification

rules.description: Bank account must be seeded with Aadhaar for DBT transfer

Exclusion: govt employee, income tax payer, owns 2/3/4-wheeler vehicle, mechanized farm equipment, KCC >=₹50k, refrigerator, pucca house. Monthly income >₹10k also excludes (checked via PMAYG-EX02). Source: PMAY-G official guidelines.
rules.ambiguity_note: Official list also includes landline phone and professional tax payer — not separately tracked. Missing fields return MISSING, not FAIL.

rules.description: Exclusion: monthly income above ₹10,000 (annual > ₹1,20,000) is excluded.
rules.ambiguity_note: Kept non-mandatory to handle income approximation. Income > ₹1.2L reduces confidence significantly.

rules.description: Exclusion: owning 7.5 acres or more of land. 7.5 acres = 3.035 hectares.
rules.ambiguity_note: Official criterion also separately excludes >=2.5 acres of irrigated land — not separately tracked.

benefit_summary: ₹1.20 lakh (plains) / ₹1.30 lakh (hilly areas) financial assistance for pucca house construction + 90-95 MGNREGA person-days
